description: Mitch, co-founder of Switchboard, discusses the development of a decentralized Oracle network on Solana, focusing on its architecture and community-driven approach. He shares insights from his background at Google and the need for scalable blockchain solutions. The workshop covers how to create and manage data feeds using Switchboard's API.
topic_summary: Mitch introduces Switchboard, a decentralized Oracle network on Solana, explaining its architecture and community involvement. He emphasizes the importance of diverse data sources and the ease of creating data feeds [t=270.31].
